story.title: Christian J. Wolliston Oral History 03182023.WAV
story.description: The interview with Christian Wolliston, conducted by John Cappadonna, explores Christian's experiences and connections with Bloomfield, including his migration from Hartford, engagement in high school sports, and future ambitions. Living in Bloomfield for around eight years, Christian discovered a passion for basketball and track, crediting community and facilities as inspiring factors. He reflects on his education, emphasizing the supportive academic environment, and discusses his growth from high school athlete to a Central Connecticut State University track runner. The conversation touches on racial dynamics, African-American and Afro-Caribbean communities, and hopes for a career in law or politics.
